pageContext.name: Masked Worker/Masked Manager
pageContext.description: The Masked Worker / Masked Manager from the smash-hit Netflix series Squid Game joins S.H.Figuarts! Standing 5.7 inches tall and featuring multiple points of articulation for easy posing and featuring a number of optional and removable accessories, this figure is sure to cast an imposing presence in your collection. Includes optional parts for displaying as either type of guard. A knife and backpack accessory are included, too.
